records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when Government DailyNews or the recognised organiser changes the July 4, 2026 event or publishes the next event notice.
limitations: The reviewed government notice covers the Kokotsha event only and does not establish nationwide recurring coverage.
Race times and programme details are not approved.
Future events require a new official notice.
records.notes: The government notice supports manual C-level date-and-venue confirmation for Kokotsha.
